name: Agricultural Combustible Dust Reporting
description: The Midwest Cooperative Grain Elevator must report its accumulated grain dust. Using the EPA Tier2 Submit application (already open), import the facility's data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\midwest_grain_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the Chemical Inventory section for the facility and add a new chemical entry for "Grain Dust". Do NOT enter a CAS number (leave it blank). Mark it as NOT an EHS and NOT a Trade Secret. Set the Physical State to Solid. In the HCS 2012 Physical Hazards section, check ONLY "Combustible Dust". Leave all Health Hazards unchecked. For quantities, set the Maximum Daily Amount to Range Code 04 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs), Average Daily Amount to Range Code 03 (1,000 - 9,999 lbs), and Number of Days On-Site to 365. For storage, add a location with Storage Type "Silo", Ambient pressure, and Ambient temperature. Save and export the final submission to C:\Tier2Data\output\midwest_grain_dust.t2s.
